How many singers do we have?

concert_singer

- singer: Singer_ID (number) [PK], Name (text), Country (text), Song_Name (text), Song_release_year (text), Age (number), Is_male (others)

学生 SQL：

正确SQL：

题目：
Find the average and maximum age for each type of pet.

数据库 ID：
pets_1

相关 Schema：
- Pets: PetID (number) [PK], PetType (text), pet_age (number), weight (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT COUNT(pet_age), max(pet_age), pettype FROM pets GROUP BY pettype
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT avg(pet_age) , max(pet_age) , pettype FROM pets GROUP BY pettype
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：聚合函数错误
错误定位：SELECT 子句中的聚合表达式
原因说明：学生把原本应该使用的聚合函数 `AVG` 误写成了 `COUNT`。聚合函数一旦写错，统计口径就会变化，结果不再对应题目想问的内容。
修改建议：将聚合函数 `COUNT` 改回 `AVG`，并保持被聚合的列不变。

question: Find the first name and age of students who have a pet.
schema_text:
- Student: StuID (number) [PK], LName (text), Fname (text), Age (number), Sex (text), Major (number), Advisor (number), city_code (text)
- Has_Pet: StuID (number) [FK->Student.StuID], PetID (number) [FK->Pets.PetID]
wrong_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.fname, T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON 1 = 1
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.fname , T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid = T2.stuid

题目：
Find the first name and age of students who have a pet.

数据库 ID：
pets_1

相关 Schema：
- Student: StuID (number) [PK], LName (text), Fname (text), Age (number), Sex (text), Major (number), Advisor (number), city_code (text)
- Has_Pet: StuID (number) [FK->Student.StuID], PetID (number) [FK->Pets.PetID]

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT T1.fname, T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON 1 = 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT T1.fname , T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid = T2.stuid
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：连接条件遗漏
错误定位：JOIN ... ON 连接条件
原因说明：学生在表连接时没有保留正确的关联条件，实际效果接近把两张表直接做笛卡尔拼接，这样会放大结果集并破坏原本的表间对应关系。
修改建议：恢复正确的 ON 条件，确保两张表通过主外键或题目要求的字段准确关联。

correct_sql: SELECT T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent = T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId = T3.Country WHERE T2.Continent = 'europe' GROUP BY T1.CountryName HAVING count(*) >= 3;

题目：
Which countries in europe have at least 3 car manufacturers?

数据库 ID：
car_1

相关 Schema：
- continents: ContId (number) [PK], Continent (text)
- countries: CountryId (number) [PK], CountryName (text), Continent (number) [FK->continents.ContId]
- car_makers: Id (number) [PK], Maker (text), FullName (text), Country (text) [FK->countries.CountryId]

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent = T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON 1 = 1 WHERE T2.Continent = 'europe' GROUP BY T1.CountryName HAVING count(*) > = 3;
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent = T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId = T3.Country WHERE T2.Continent = 'europe' GROUP BY T1.CountryName HAVING count(*) >= 3;
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：连接条件遗漏
错误定位：JOIN ... ON 连接条件
原因说明：学生在表连接时没有保留正确的关联条件，实际效果接近把两张表直接做笛卡尔拼接，这样会放大结果集并破坏原本的表间对应关系。
修改建议：恢复正确的 ON 条件，确保两张表通过主外键或题目要求的字段准确关联。

题目：
Which shop has the most employees? Give me the shop name.

数据库 ID：
employee_hire_evaluation

相关 Schema：
- shop: Shop_ID (number) [PK], Name (text), Location (text), District (text), Number_products (number), Manager_name (text)
- hiring: Shop_ID (number) [FK->shop.Shop_ID], Employee_ID (number) [PK | FK->employee.Employee_ID], Start_from (text), Is_full_time (others)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT t2.name FROM hiring AS t1 JOIN shop AS t2 ON t1.shop_id = t2.shop_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT t2.name FROM hiring AS t1 JOIN shop AS t2 ON t1.shop_id = t2.shop_id GROUP BY t1.shop_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
```

错误类型：分组与聚合不匹配
错误定位：GROUP BY 子句
原因说明：题目需要按照某个维度分组后再统计，但学生 SQL 去掉了 GROUP BY，会导致非聚合列与聚合结果之间不再匹配，无法正确表达每组的统计含义。
修改建议：补回与题意一致的 GROUP BY 子句，让分组维度和聚合结果重新对应起来。

题目：
Which template type code is used by most number of documents?

数据库 ID：
cre_Doc_Template_Mgt

相关 Schema：
- Templates: Template_ID (number) [PK], Version_Number (number), Template_Type_Code (text) [FK->Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code], Date_Effective_From (time), Date_Effective_To (time), Template_Details (text)
- Documents: Document_ID (number) [PK], Template_ID (number) [FK->Templates.Template_ID], Document_Name (text), Document_Description (text), Other_Details (text)

学生 SQL：


正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.template_type_code FROM Templates AS T1 JOIN Documents AS T2 ON T1.template_id = T2.template_id GROUP BY T1.template_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
```

请批阅下面这道 SQL 练习。

题目：
Return the type code of the template type with the description "Book".

数据库 ID：
cre_Doc_Template_Mgt

相关 Schema：
- Ref_Template_Types: Template_Type_Code (text) [PK], Template_Type_Description (text)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT Template_Type_Description FROM Ref_template_types WHERE template_type_description = `` Book ''
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT template_type_code FROM Ref_template_types WHERE template_type_description = "Book"
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：字段选择错误
错误定位：SELECT 子句
原因说明：学生把应返回的列 `Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code` 误写成了 `Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Description`，导致结果列的含义和题目要求不一致。
修改建议：将 SELECT 中的 `Template_Type_Description` 改回与题意对应的 `template_type_code`，其余连接、筛选和排序逻辑保持不变。

question: What are the distinct template type descriptions for the templates ever used by any document?
schema_text:
- Ref_Template_Types: Template_Type_Code (text) [PK], Template_Type_Description (text)
- Templates: Template_ID (number) [PK], Version_Number (number), Template_Type_Code (text) [FK->Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code], Date_Effective_From (time), Date_Effective_To (time), Template_Details (text)
- Documents: Document_ID (number) [PK], Template_ID (number) [FK->Templates.Template_ID], Document_Name (text), Document_Description (text), Other_Details (text)
wrong_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.template_type_description FROM Ref_template_types AS T1 JOIN Templates AS T2 ON 1 = 1 JOIN Documents AS T3 ON T2.Template_ID = T3.template_ID
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.template_type_description FROM Ref_template_types AS T1 JOIN Templates AS T2 ON T1.template_type_code = T2.template_type_code JOIN Documents AS T3 ON T2.Template_ID = T3.template_ID

请批阅下面这道 SQL 练习。

题目：
What are the distinct template type descriptions for the templates ever used by any document?

数据库 ID：
cre_Doc_Template_Mgt

相关 Schema：
- Ref_Template_Types: Template_Type_Code (text) [PK], Template_Type_Description (text)
- Templates: Template_ID (number) [PK], Version_Number (number), Template_Type_Code (text) [FK->Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code], Date_Effective_From (time), Date_Effective_To (time), Template_Details (text)
- Documents: Document_ID (number) [PK], Template_ID (number) [FK->Templates.Template_ID], Document_Name (text), Document_Description (text), Other_Details (text)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT T1.template_type_description FROM Ref_template_types AS T1 JOIN Templates AS T2 ON 1 = 1 JOIN Documents AS T3 ON T2.Template_ID = T3.template_ID
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT T1.template_type_description FROM Ref_template_types AS T1 JOIN Templates AS T2 ON T1.template_type_code = T2.template_type_code JOIN Documents AS T3 ON T2.Template_ID = T3.template_ID
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：连接条件遗漏
错误定位：JOIN ... ON 连接条件
原因说明：学生在表连接时没有保留正确的关联条件，实际效果接近把两张表直接做笛卡尔拼接，这样会放大结果集并破坏原本的表间对应关系。
修改建议：恢复正确的 ON 条件，确保两张表通过主外键或题目要求的字段准确关联。

题目：
Find the name and age of the visitor who bought the most tickets at once.

数据库 ID：
museum_visit

相关 Schema：
- visitor: ID (number) [PK], Name (text), Level_of_membership (number), Age (number)
- visit: Museum_ID (number) [PK | FK->museum.Museum_ID], visitor_ID (text) [FK->visitor.ID], Num_of_Ticket (number), Total_spent (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT t1.name, t1.age FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.visitor_id ORDER BY t2.num_of_ticket ASC LIMIT 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT t1.name , t1.age FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.visitor_id ORDER BY t2.num_of_ticket DESC LIMIT 1
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：排序方向错误
错误定位：ORDER BY 子句
原因说明：学生把排序方向写成了 `ASC`，而题目需要的是 `DESC`。排序方向写反会直接改变最终返回记录的先后顺序。
修改建议：将 ORDER BY 的排序方向改回 `DESC`。

List the first name and birth date of all players from the country with code USA.

wta_1

相关 Schema：
- players: player_id (number) [PK], first_name (text), last_name (text), hand (text), birth_date (time), country_code (text)


正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT first_name , birth_date FROM players WHERE country_code = 'USA'
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：筛选条件错误

修改建议：将 WHERE 中的运算符 `!=` 改回 `=`。

- players: player_id (number) [PK], first_name (text), last_name (text), hand (text), birth_date (time), country_code (text)
- rankings: ranking_date (time), ranking (number), player_id (number) [FK->players.player_id], ranking_points (number), tours (number)
wrong_sql: SELECT T1.country_code, T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id ORDER BY T2.tours ASC LIMIT 1
correct_sql: SELECT T1.country_code , T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id ORDER BY T2.tours DESC LIMIT 1

题目：
Find the first name and country code of the player who did the most number of tours.

数据库 ID：
wta_1

相关 Schema：
- players: player_id (number) [PK], first_name (text), last_name (text), hand (text), birth_date (time), country_code (text)
- rankings: ranking_date (time), ranking (number), player_id (number) [FK->players.player_id], ranking_points (number), tours (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.country_code, T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id ORDER BY T2.tours ASC LIMIT 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.country_code , T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id ORDER BY T2.tours DESC LIMIT 1
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：排序方向错误
错误定位：ORDER BY 子句
原因说明：学生把排序方向写成了 `ASC`，而题目需要的是 `DESC`。排序方向写反会直接改变最终返回记录的先后顺序。
修改建议：将 ORDER BY 的排序方向改回 `DESC`。

请批阅下面这道 SQL 练习。

题目：
What is the first name, country code, and birth date of the player with the most winner rank points across all matches?

数据库 ID：
wta_1

相关 Schema：
- players: player_id (number) [PK], first_name (text), last_name (text), hand (text), birth_date (time), country_code (text)
- matches: best_of (number), draw_size (number), loser_age (number), loser_entry (text), loser_hand (text), loser_ht (number), loser_id (number) [FK->players.player_id], loser_ioc (text), loser_name (text), loser_rank (number), loser_rank_points (number), loser_seed (number), match_num (number), minutes (number), round (text), score (text), surface (text), tourney_date (time), tourney_id (text), tourney_level (text), tourney_name (text), winner_age (number), winner_entry (text), winner_hand (text), winner_ht (number), winner_id (number) [FK->players.player_id], winner_ioc (text), winner_name (text), winner_rank (number), winner_rank_points (number), winner_seed (number), year (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.first_name, T1.country_code, T1.birth_date FROM players AS T1 JOIN matches AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.winner_id ORDER BY T2.winner_rank_points ASC LIMIT 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.first_name , T1.country_code , T1.birth_date FROM players AS T1 JOIN matches AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.winner_id ORDER BY T2.winner_rank_points DESC LIMIT 1
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：排序方向错误
错误定位：ORDER BY 子句
原因说明：学生把排序方向写成了 `ASC`，而题目需要的是 `DESC`。排序方向写反会直接改变最终返回记录的先后顺序。
修改建议：将 ORDER BY 的排序方向改回 `DESC`。

纠错解析：

- ship: lost_in_battle (number) [FK->battle.id], id (number) [PK], name (text), tonnage (text), ship_type (text), location (text), disposition_of_ship (text)
- death: caused_by_ship_id (number) [FK->ship.id], id (number) [PK], note (text), killed (number), injured (number)
wrong_sql: SELECT T1.killed, T1.killed FROM death AS T1 JOIN ship AS t2 ON T1.caused_by_ship_id = T2.id WHERE T2.tonnage = 't'
correct_sql: SELECT T1.killed , T1.injured FROM death AS T1 JOIN ship AS t2 ON T1.caused_by_ship_id = T2.id WHERE T2.tonnage = 't'

题目：
What are the death and injury situations caused by the ship with tonnage 't'?

数据库 ID：
battle_death

相关 Schema：
- ship: lost_in_battle (number) [FK->battle.id], id (number) [PK], name (text), tonnage (text), ship_type (text), location (text), disposition_of_ship (text)
- death: caused_by_ship_id (number) [FK->ship.id], id (number) [PK], note (text), killed (number), injured (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.killed, T1.killed FROM death AS T1 JOIN ship AS t2 ON T1.caused_by_ship_id = T2.id WHERE T2.tonnage = 't'
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.killed , T1.injured FROM death AS T1 JOIN ship AS t2 ON T1.caused_by_ship_id = T2.id WHERE T2.tonnage = 't'
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：字段选择错误
错误定位：SELECT 子句
原因说明：学生把应返回的列 `death.injured` 误写成了 `death.killed`，导致结果列的含义和题目要求不一致。
修改建议：将 SELECT 中的 `T1.killed` 改回与题意对应的 `T1.injured`，其余连接、筛选和排序逻辑保持不变。

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.first_name , T1.middle_name , T1.last_name , T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*) = 2
```

数据库 ID：
student_transcripts_tracking

相关 Schema：
- Students: student_id (number) [PK], current_address_id (number) [FK->Addresses.address_id], permanent_address_id (number) [FK->Addresses.address_id], first_name (text), middle_name (text), last_name (text), cell_mobile_number (text), email_address (text), ssn (text), date_first_registered (time), date_left (time), other_student_details (text)
- Student_Enrolment: student_enrolment_id (number) [PK], degree_program_id (number) [FK->Degree_Programs.degree_program_id], semester_id (number) [FK->Semesters.semester_id], student_id (number) [FK->Students.student_id], other_details (text)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.student_id, T1.first_name, T1.middle_name, T1.last_name, count(*), T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON 1 = 1 GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.student_id , T1.first_name , T1.middle_name , T1.last_name , count(*) , T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：连接条件遗漏
错误定位：JOIN ... ON 连接条件
原因说明：学生在表连接时没有保留正确的关联条件，实际效果接近把两张表直接做笛卡尔拼接，这样会放大结果集并破坏原本的表间对应关系。
修改建议：恢复正确的 ON 条件，确保两张表通过主外键或题目要求的字段准确关联。

请批阅下面这道 SQL 练习。

题目：
Show the date of the transcript which shows the least number of results, also list the id.

数据库 ID：
student_transcripts_tracking

相关 Schema：
- Transcripts: transcript_id (number) [PK], transcript_date (time), other_details (text)
- Transcript_Contents: student_course_id (number) [FK->Student_Enrolment_Courses.student_course_id], transcript_id (number) [FK->Transcripts.transcript_id]

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T2.transcript_date, T1.transcript_id FROM Transcript_Contents AS T1 JOIN Transcripts AS T2 ON 1 = 1 GROUP BY T1.transcript_id ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T2.transcript_date , T1.transcript_id FROM Transcript_Contents AS T1 JOIN Transcripts AS T2 ON T1.transcript_id = T2.transcript_id GROUP BY T1.transcript_id ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：连接条件遗漏
错误定位：JOIN ... ON 连接条件
原因说明：学生在表连接时没有保留正确的关联条件，实际效果接近把两张表直接做笛卡尔拼接，这样会放大结果集并破坏原本的表间对应关系。
修改建议：恢复正确的 ON 条件，确保两张表通过主外键或题目要求的字段准确关联。

question: Find the first name of the students who permanently live in the country Haiti or have the cell phone number 09700166582 .
schema_text:
- Addresses: address_id (number) [PK], line_1 (text), line_2 (text), line_3 (text), city (text), zip_postcode (text), state_province_county (text), country (text), other_address_details (text)
- Students: student_id (number) [PK], current_address_id (number) [FK->Addresses.address_id], permanent_address_id (number) [FK->Addresses.address_id], first_name (text), middle_name (text), last_name (text), cell_mobile_number (text), email_address (text), ssn (text), date_first_registered (time), date_left (time), other_student_details (text)
wrong_sql: select t1.first_name from students as t1 join addresses as t2 on 1 = 1 where t2.country = "haiti" or t1.cell_mobile_number = "09700166582"
correct_sql: select t1.first_name from students as t1 join addresses as t2 on t1.permanent_address_id = t2.address_id where t2.country = 'haiti' or t1.cell_mobile_number = '09700166582'

题目：

student_transcripts_tracking

相关 Schema：
- Addresses: address_id (number) [PK], line_1 (text), line_2 (text), line_3 (text), city (text), zip_postcode (text), state_province_county (text), country (text), other_address_details (text)
- Students: student_id (number) [PK], current_address_id (number) [FK->Addresses.address_id], permanent_address_id (number) [FK->Addresses.address_id], first_name (text), middle_name (text), last_name (text), cell_mobile_number (text), email_address (text), ssn (text), date_first_registered (time), date_left (time), other_student_details (text)

正确SQL：

题目：
What are the final tables made and best finishes for all poker players?

数据库 ID：
poker_player

相关 Schema：
- poker_player: Poker_Player_ID (number) [PK], People_ID (number) [FK->people.People_ID], Final_Table_Made (number), Best_Finish (number), Money_Rank (number), Earnings (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT Final_Table_Made, Money_Rank FROM poker_player
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT Final_Table_Made , Best_Finish FROM poker_player
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：字段选择错误
错误定位：SELECT 子句
原因说明：学生把应返回的列 `poker_player.Best_Finish` 误写成了 `poker_player.Money_Rank`，导致结果列的含义和题目要求不一致。
修改建议：将 SELECT 中的 `Money_Rank` 改回与题意对应的 `Best_Finish`，其余连接、筛选和排序逻辑保持不变。

题目：
What is the birth date of the poker player with the lowest earnings?

数据库 ID：
poker_player

相关 Schema：
- poker_player: Poker_Player_ID (number) [PK], People_ID (number) [FK->people.People_ID], Final_Table_Made (number), Best_Finish (number), Money_Rank (number), Earnings (number)
- people: People_ID (number) [PK], Nationality (text), Name (text), Birth_Date (text), Height (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.Birth_Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Earnings DESC LIMIT 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.Birth_Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Earnings ASC LIMIT 1
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：排序方向错误
错误定位：ORDER BY 子句
原因说明：学生把排序方向写成了 `DESC`，而题目需要的是 `ASC`。排序方向写反会直接改变最终返回记录的先后顺序。
修改建议：将 ORDER BY 的排序方向改回 `ASC`。

正确SQL：

修改建议：恢复正确的 ON 条件，确保两张表通过主外键或题目要求的字段准确关联。

相关 Schema：
- country: Code (text) [PK], Name (text), Continent (text), Region (text), SurfaceArea (number), IndepYear (number), Population (number), LifeExpectancy (number), GNP (number), GNPOld (number), LocalName (text), GovernmentForm (text), HeadOfState (text), Capital (number), Code2 (text)
- countrylanguage: CountryCode (text) [PK | FK->country.Code], Language (text), IsOfficial (text), Percentage (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql

```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT COUNT(T2.Language) , T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode GROUP BY T1.Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 2
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：连接条件遗漏

修改建议：恢复正确的 ON 条件，确保两张表通过主外键或题目要求的字段准确关联。

wrong_sql: SELECT CountryCode, max(Percentage) FROM countrylanguage WHERE LANGUAGE != `` Spanish '' GROUP BY CountryCode
correct_sql: SELECT CountryCode , max(Percentage) FROM countrylanguage WHERE LANGUAGE = "Spanish" GROUP BY CountryCode

题目：
What are the codes of countries where Spanish is spoken by the largest percentage of people?

数据库 ID：
world_1

相关 Schema：
- countrylanguage: CountryCode (text) [PK | FK->country.Code], Language (text), IsOfficial (text), Percentage (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT CountryCode, max(Percentage) FROM countrylanguage WHERE LANGUAGE != `` Spanish '' GROUP BY CountryCode
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT CountryCode , max(Percentage) FROM countrylanguage WHERE LANGUAGE = "Spanish" GROUP BY CountryCode
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：筛选条件错误
错误定位：WHERE 子句
原因说明：学生把筛选运算符从 `=` 写成了 `!=`，会把题目要求保留的数据过滤方向反过来，导致结果集范围错误。
修改建议：将 WHERE 中的运算符 `!=` 改回 `=`。

题目：
Find the number of orchestras whose record format is "CD" or "DVD".

数据库 ID：
orchestra

相关 Schema：
- orchestra: Orchestra_ID (number) [PK], Orchestra (text), Conductor_ID (number) [FK->conductor.Conductor_ID], Record_Company (text), Year_of_Founded (number), Major_Record_Format (text)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orchestra WHERE Major_Record_Format != `` CD '' OR Major_Record_Format = `` DVD ''
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orchestra WHERE Major_Record_Format = "CD" OR Major_Record_Format = "DVD"
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：筛选条件错误
错误定位：WHERE 子句
原因说明：学生把筛选运算符从 `=` 写成了 `!=`，会把题目要求保留的数据过滤方向反过来，导致结果集范围错误。
修改建议：将 WHERE 中的运算符 `!=` 改回 `=`。

请批阅下面这道 SQL 练习。

题目：
Show the names of high schoolers who have likes, and numbers of likes for each.

数据库 ID：
network_1

相关 Schema：
- Highschooler: ID (number) [PK], name (text), grade (number)
- Likes: student_id (number) [PK | FK->Highschooler.ID], liked_id (number) [FK->Highschooler.ID]

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T2.grade, count(*) FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T2.name , count(*) FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：字段选择错误
错误定位：SELECT 子句
原因说明：学生把应返回的列 `Highschooler.name` 误写成了 `Highschooler.grade`，导致结果列的含义和题目要求不一致。
修改建议：将 SELECT 中的 `T2.grade` 改回与题意对应的 `T2.name`，其余连接、筛选和排序逻辑保持不变。

question: Show the names of high schoolers who have likes, and numbers of likes for each.

- Likes: student_id (number) [PK | FK->Highschooler.ID], liked_id (number) [FK->Highschooler.ID]
wrong_sql: SELECT T2.name, MAX(*) FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id
correct_sql: SELECT T2.name , count(*) FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id

题目：

修改建议：将聚合函数 `MAX` 改回 `COUNT`，并保持被聚合的列不变。

question: What are the names of high schoolers who have likes, and how many likes does each have?
schema_text:

- Likes: student_id (number) [PK | FK->Highschooler.ID], liked_id (number) [FK->Highschooler.ID]
wrong_sql: SELECT T2.name, count(*) FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON 1 = 1 GROUP BY T1.student_id
correct_sql: SELECT T2.name , count(*) FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id

question: What is the name of the high schooler who has the greatest number of likes?
schema_text:

- Likes: student_id (number) [PK | FK->Highschooler.ID], liked_id (number) [FK->Highschooler.ID]

question: Show the names of students who have at least 2 likes.
schema_text:
- Highschooler: ID (number) [PK], name (text), grade (number)
- Likes: student_id (number) [PK | FK->Highschooler.ID], liked_id (number) [FK->Highschooler.ID]
wrong_sql: SELECT T2.ID FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*) > = 2
correct_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*) >= 2

相关 Schema：

- Likes: student_id (number) [PK | FK->Highschooler.ID], liked_id (number) [FK->Highschooler.ID]

请批阅下面这道 SQL 练习。

题目：
Find the owner id and zip code of the owner who spent the most money in total for his or her dogs.

数据库 ID：
dog_kennels

相关 Schema：
- Owners: owner_id (number) [PK], first_name (text), last_name (text), street (text), city (text), state (text), zip_code (text), email_address (text), home_phone (text), cell_number (text)
- Dogs: dog_id (number) [PK], owner_id (number) [FK->Owners.owner_id/Owners.owner_id], abandoned_yn (text), breed_code (text) [FK->Breeds.breed_code], size_code (text) [FK->Sizes.size_code], name (text), age (text), date_of_birth (time), gender (text), weight (text), date_arrived (time), date_adopted (time), date_departed (time)
- Treatments: treatment_id (number) [PK], dog_id (number) [FK->Dogs.dog_id], professional_id (number) [FK->Professionals.professional_id], treatment_type_code (text) [FK->Treatment_Types.treatment_type_code], date_of_treatment (time), cost_of_treatment (number)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.owner_id, T1.zip_code FROM Owners AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.owner_id = T2.owner_id JOIN Treatments AS T3 ON T2.dog_id = T3.dog_id ORDER BY sum(T3.cost_of_treatment) DESC LIMIT 1
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT T1.owner_id , T1.zip_code FROM Owners AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.owner_id = T2.owner_id JOIN Treatments AS T3 ON T2.dog_id = T3.dog_id GROUP BY T1.owner_id ORDER BY sum(T3.cost_of_treatment) DESC LIMIT 1
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：分组与聚合不匹配
错误定位：GROUP BY 子句
原因说明：题目需要按照某个维度分组后再统计，但学生 SQL 去掉了 GROUP BY，会导致非聚合列与聚合结果之间不再匹配，无法正确表达每组的统计含义。
修改建议：补回与题意一致的 GROUP BY 子句，让分组维度和聚合结果重新对应起来。

题目：
What are the names of the singers whose birth years are either 1948 or 1949?

数据库 ID：
singer

相关 Schema：
- singer: Singer_ID (number) [PK], Name (text), Birth_Year (number), Net_Worth_Millions (number), Citizenship (text)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Birth_Year != 1948 OR Birth_Year = 1949
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Birth_Year = 1948 OR Birth_Year = 1949
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：筛选条件错误
错误定位：WHERE 子句
原因说明：学生把筛选运算符从 `=` 写成了 `!=`，会把题目要求保留的数据过滤方向反过来，导致结果集范围错误。
修改建议：将 WHERE 中的运算符 `!=` 改回 `=`。

wrong_sql: SELECT Citizenship FROM singer WHERE Birth_Year = 1948 OR Birth_Year = 1949
correct_sql: SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Birth_Year = 1948 OR Birth_Year = 1949

题目：
Show different citizenship of singers and the number of singers of each citizenship.

数据库 ID：
singer

相关 Schema：
- singer: Singer_ID (number) [PK], Name (text), Birth_Year (number), Net_Worth_Millions (number), Citizenship (text)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT Citizenship, COUNT(*) FROM singer
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT Citizenship , COUNT(*) FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：分组与聚合不匹配
错误定位：GROUP BY 子句
原因说明：题目需要按照某个维度分组后再统计，但学生 SQL 去掉了 GROUP BY，会导致非聚合列与聚合结果之间不再匹配，无法正确表达每组的统计含义。
修改建议：补回与题意一致的 GROUP BY 子句，让分组维度和聚合结果重新对应起来。

题目：
Show different citizenships and the maximum net worth of singers of each citizenship.

数据库 ID：
singer

相关 Schema：
- singer: Singer_ID (number) [PK], Name (text), Birth_Year (number), Net_Worth_Millions (number), Citizenship (text)

学生 SQL：
```sql
SELECT Citizenship, COUNT(Net_Worth_Millions) FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship
```

正确SQL：
```sql
SELECT Citizenship , max(Net_Worth_Millions) FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship
```

纠错解析：
错误类型：聚合函数错误
错误定位：SELECT 子句中的聚合表达式
原因说明：学生把原本应该使用的聚合函数 `MAX` 误写成了 `COUNT`。聚合函数一旦写错，统计口径就会变化，结果不再对应题目想问的内容。
修改建议：将聚合函数 `COUNT` 改回 `MAX`，并保持被聚合的列不变。
